chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: 83 - عن إسحاق بن عمار قال: سمعته يقول: إن الله عز وجل خلق خلقا ضن بهم عن البلاء، خلقهم في عافية، وأحياهم في عافية، وأماتهم في عافية، و أدخلهم الجنة في عافية.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 83. It has been reported that Ishaq ibn 'Ammar said: I heard him (al-Sadiq (a.s)) saying: Allah has (some) creatures that He keeps away from trials. He creates them in well-being, gives them life in well-being, grasps their souls in well-being and causes them to enter Paradise in well-being.
